strings.text: The requested quad is not in our registry.
Dominate the landscape of The Granja Xtreme with a machine built for champions. The

combines a high-torque performance engine with a lightweight chassis, offering trail maneuverability that defies its size. Whether you're navigating tight technical forest sections or opening up the throttle on wide open flats, this vehicle provides a visceral, stable connection to the terrain.

Our entire fleet is maintained to the highest safety and reliability standards, ensuring that while your off-road ride is extreme, your safety and the machine's mechanical performance are never in question.
Your safety is our absolute priority. Every vehicle undergoes a rigorous 40-point inspection prior to your reservation. Furthermore, all reservations include a complimentary guided briefing.
A 15-minute operational and trail safety briefing is required for all riders, regardless of experience.
DOT-approved helmets and protective eyewear are provided and mandatory while operating the vehicle.
Quad is available for these dates!
Please select rental dates on the calendar to see pricing breakdown.
Where premium engineering meets the untamed wild. Discover the story behind the world's most exclusive off-road experience.
Expert guides, technical masters, and safety protocols that set the industry standard.
Explore the landscapes we conquer and the fleet that takes us there.
Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive trail access, VIP booking windows, and technical off-road workshops.

Includes standard equipment and safety gear.
Customer receives the ATV in good condition.
Customer must have a valid driver’s license.
Customer must wear a helmet and safety equipment.
No driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs.
Customer is responsible for any traffic violations or fines.
Customer is responsible for damages caused by negligence or misuse.
Customer may not lend, transfer, or sub-rent the ATV to another person.
ATV must be returned on the agreed date and time.
Late returns may result in additional charges.
Granja Xtreme is not responsible for lost personal belongings.
Customer acknowledges and accepts the risks associated with ATV riding.
In case of an accident, customer must notify Granja Xtreme immediately.
The customer understands and agrees that any insurance available for the ATV provides coverage only as required by law and subject to the limits, conditions, and exclusions of the insurance policy.
The customer acknowledges that such insurance may not cover all damages to the ATV, nor all property damage, bodily injury, or losses caused to third parties.

The customer shall be fully responsible for any damage, loss, broken parts, mechanical damage, rollover, accident, misuse, negligence, reckless operation, or violation of this rental agreement occurring during the rental period.
The customer shall also be responsible for any deductible, repair costs, loss of use, towing charges, recovery expenses, administrative fees, or any other costs not covered by the insurance policy.

If damages or injuries caused to third parties exceed the insurance coverage limits or are excluded from coverage, the customer shall be solely responsible for such damages, claims, expenses, legal fees, and liabilities.

The customer agrees to operate the ATV at their own risk and releases Granja Xtreme, its owners, employees, and representatives from liability for accidents, injuries, damages, or losses resulting from the customer’s negligence, misuse, violation of safety rules, or breach of this rental agreement.
Thank you for your business! Please remit payment by the due date.
Ready for your next adventure? Our team is here to help you craft the perfect off-road experience in the heart of nature.
Inquiry sent successfully! Our staff will email you shortly.
Your reservation has been received. Payment will be collected when you arrive.
A confirmation email has been sent to your registered address. Please ensure you have your digital contract ready on your mobile device when arriving at the base camp.
Review your adventure details before finalizing the reservation. Our all-terrain experiences are designed for maximum thrill and safety.
The pinnacle of off-road engineering. Premium performance shocks, and intelligent Throttle Control (iTC). Model:
Please arrive 30 minutes early for the safety briefing and gear fitting. Remember to bring a valid driver's license and wear closed-toe shoes.
Payment will be collected manually at the trailhead.

I hereby acknowledge that operating an All-Terrain Vehicle (ATV) is a high-risk activity. I agree to wear a helmet at all times, follow all safety instructions, and assume full financial responsibility for any damages caused to the vehicle. I release The Granja Xtreme from any liability for personal injuries sustained during the rental duration. Helmets are mandatory. Operation is prohibited under the influence of drugs or alcohol. All riders must strictly stay within authorized zones.
I have read and agree to the Liability Waiver, Terms of Service, and Cancellation Policy.
Your waiver acceptance is digitally recorded and legally binding.
We collect payment on arrival. Please select how you prefer to pay when you arrive at the trailhead.
